zh.lifeSummary: 當Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston於1469年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir George Ker of Samuelston19歲，母親Mariëtte Sinclair19歲。她於1493年3月22日之前與Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1528年1月2日在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston于1469年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir George Ker of Samuelston19岁，母亲Mariëtte Sinclair19岁。她于1493年3月22日之前与Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1528年1月2日在英国苏格兰艾丁波享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kerr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived by a marsh or swampy woodland, Middle English kerr ‘brushwood, wet ground’ (Old Norse kjarr). A legend grew up that the Kerrs were left-handed, on theory that the name is derived from Gaelic cearr ‘wrong-handed, left-handed’.
Americanized form of German   Kehr   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Carr
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Carra ‘descendant of Carra’, a personal name from the adjective corr ‘pointed’, explained as meaning ‘spear’. As an Ulster surname, Carr was often confused with Scottish Kerr .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Mac Giolla Chathair, a Donegal name meaning ‘son of Giolla Cathair’ or ‘the servant (i.e. devotee) of Saint Cathar’. Cathar was a priest and bishop, otherwise unknown.
Irish: in Galway, a shortened Anglicized form of Mac Giolla Chéire, see Keary .

variants.name: Caris
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from any of several places called Carr House or Carrhouse (examples of which are found in northern counties including Cheshire and Yorkshire), from Middle English kerr ‘wet ground’ or ‘brushwood’ (Old Norse kjarr; see Kerr ) + h(o)us ‘house’ (Old English hūs).
Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Macarius, from Greek Makarios ‘blessed’, a Christian saint's name.
Americanized form of German   Karis  , a cognate of 2 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston was born in 1469, in Scotland, her father, Sir George Ker of Samuelston, was 19 and her mother, Mariëtte Sinclair, was 19. She married Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton before 22 March 1493. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 January 1528, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston est née en 1469, à Écosse, son père, Sir George Ker of Samuelston, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mariëtte Sinclair, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton avant 22 mars 1493. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1528, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston 1469 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Ker of Samuelston 19 und ihre Mutter Mariëtte Sinclair 19. Sie hat vor 22. März 1493 Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1528 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston è nata il nel 1469 nel Scotland, sua padre, Sir George Ker of Samuelston, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mariëtte Sinclair, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton prima del 22 marzo 1493. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 gennaio 1528, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelstonが1469年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir George Ker of Samuelstonは19歳，母Mariëtte Sinclairは19歳であった。1493年3月22日以前にAlexander Home II Laird of Eglintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1528年1月2日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston(이)가 1469년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Ker of Samuelston(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariëtte Sinclair(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1493년 3월 22일 이전 Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1528년 1월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston nasceu em 1469, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir George Ker of Samuelston, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mariëtte Sinclair, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton antes 22 de março de 1493. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1528, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston родилась в 1469 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir George Ker of Samuelston было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariëtte Sinclair, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton перед 22 марта 1493 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 января 1528 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston nació en 1469, en Scotland, su papá, Sir George Ker of Samuelston, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mariëtte Sinclair, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton antes de 22 de marzo de 1493. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de enero de 1528, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
